title: Software Architect (Golang)
description:
Our partner is an American company that has developed a specialized leave management system. Among the product’s clients are Google, IBM, Meta, Adobe, and other leading global corporations.

We are looking for a Golang and a Software Architect to join a team of highly skilled engineers, where the minimum development experience is 12 years.

Main Responsibilities

– Participate in the design, implementation, and maintenance of server-side code for web applications and services, ensuring it is efficient, scalable, and secure

– Design and manage databases, including schema design and improvements, query optimization, and ensuring data integrity and security

– Develop and maintain integrations between different parts of the system and with external services, ensuring robustness and clear documentation

– Ensure code is developed with a comprehensive understanding of deployment procedures and how it will function within the overall project scope

– Implement and maintain comprehensive test coverage to ensure the reliability and stability of the codebase

– Regularly maintain and refactor the codebase to address issues, improve performance, and manage technical debt

– Work closely with a geographically distributed team of engineers, QA, UI/UX designers, and PMs to ensure seamless integration, align on project goals, and collaboratively address technical challenges

– Actively participate in regular internal team meetings and company-wide meetings to stay aligned with project goals, share updates, and contribute to broader organizational challenges

– Implement and adhere to security best practices to protect against common vulnerabilities and ensure the safety of the application and its data

Mandatory Requirements

– 4+ years of experience in commercial software development Go programming language

– 10+ years of experience with software development

– Experience with relational databases, including writing and optimizing SQL queries, designing schemas, and managing migrations

– Basic understanding in containerizing applications using Docker and managing Dockerfiles

– Experience with CI/CD pipelines, automating build, test, and deployment processes, and familiarity with tools like Jenkins or GitHub Actions

– Proficiency in Git for version control, including branching, merging, pull requests, and code review practices

– Proficiency in testing and debugging, including writing unit and integration tests

– Ability to design and implement scalable RESTful and GraphQL APIs, with a strong emphasis on security best practices (e.g., OWASP Top 10)

– Analytical and problem-solving abilities to address technical challenges and optimize existing systems

– Strong communication and documentation skills with the ability to explain technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders

Will be a plus

– Understanding of concurrency models, goroutines, channels, and parallelism

– Familiarity with additional database technologies like Cassandra, Redis, or Elasticsearch can be beneficial for handling diverse data storage and retrieval needs

– Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, including deployment, scaling, and managing services

– Experience with GraphQL, which can complement RESTful API skills

– Experience with message brokers can be useful for managing asynchronous communication in distributed systems

– Familiarity with Ruby on Rails since we have an internal project using this framework

We offer

– Equipment

– Ongoing learning opportunities

– Insurance for employees and family

– Opportunity for the most experienced employees to work in the US office in the future

title: Production Operations Specialist
description:
ELVTR is a premier online education platform offering live courses taught by top executives from globally renowned companies. We are dedicated to transforming the online education industry by providing innovative course offerings.

We’re looking for a highly organized and dependable Production Operations Specialist to join our team. You will support the Production team by taking ownership of admin and coordination-driven work so producers can focus on instructor relationships and product development.

This job is for you if you are

- A highly organized and detail-oriented person who enjoys bringing structure to complex workflows
- Quick to learn and comfortable picking up new processes, tools, and systems
- Reliable with follow-through and able to manage coordination-heavy work with consistency
- Proactive with reminders, follow-ups, and flagging blockers before they become issues
- Able to juggle multiple timelines at once
- A collaborative team player who enjoys supporting others and helping operations run smoothly
- Comfortable working with AI tools

Responsibilities

- Support relaunch planning and coordination across teams, including timelines, task tracking, and internal handoffs
- Coordinate cross-launch and cross-sell setup to ensure dependencies are covered
- Assist with legal and documentation workflows by collecting inputs, preparing drafts, organizing files, and tracking signature status
- Create first drafts of supporting materials such as comparison sheets, brochures, employer guides, and other course resources
- Own reminders, follow-ups, and recurring admin tasks across the course lifecycle
- Prepare draft recommendation letters and route them for final review and approval
- Help improve consistency and efficiency in how Production workflows are managed

Requirements

- Experience in operations, coordination, administration, project support, or a similar role
- Genuine interest in AI and willingness to actively explore and implement AI tools and automations in day-to-day work
- English proficiency at a level that allows clear written and verbal communication
- Strong organizational skills and close attention to detail
- Ability to manage multiple tasks and timelines with reliability and accuracy
- Comfort working independently with minimum supervision

Benefits

-  Competitive Salary and Bonuses: We value your contributions and offer competitive compensation.
-  Comprehensive Benefits: Enjoy gym membership reimbursements, mental health benefits, generous vacation allowances, and complimentary access to all our courses.
-  Flexible Work Environment: Work remotely with a schedule that accommodates your personal and professional needs.
-  Growth Opportunities: Join a company committed to your professional development, offering abundant opportunities for career advancement.

Why You Should Join ELVTR

-  Innovative Culture: Be part of a team that values creativity, collaboration, and intellectual curiosity.
-  Impactful Work: Contribute to a mission that is reshaping the future of online education.
-  Professional Development: Take advantage of learning opportunities and growth prospects within a forward-thinking company.

Join Us

If you are a detail-oriented professional ready to contribute to a leading online education platform, we encourage you to apply. Elevate your career with ELVTR.

ELVTR is committed to providing equal opportunities and fostering a diverse, inclusive environment for all, whether you join us as an employee or a contractor.

title: Senior PHP Developer (Laravel) for IoT-Driven Workforce Operations Platform
description:
We are looking for a Senior PHP Developer to join a long-term project focused on building and evolving a complex data-processing platform in the Construction Technology domain.

This role is centered around backend architecture, high-load systems, and real-time data processing. You will be responsible for designing scalable services, managing asynchronous data flows, and ensuring reliable ingestion and processing of IoT device data.

The platform plays a key role in workforce tracking, operational efficiency, and automation of field processes. It processes large volumes of real-time data and applies complex business logic for workforce scheduling and analytics.

This is a backend-focused role with high ownership and impact on system architecture and performance.

Benefits

- Opportunity to solve complex architectural and high-load challenges
- Professional growth within a scaling tech company
- High-impact role in a real-world IoT and data-driven product
- Work with modern backend technologies and distributed systems
- Remote-first environment with flexibility and autonomy

About the Client

International product company in the Construction Technology domain, focused on automating workforce management processes through IoT and cloud-based solutions.

The product replaces manual time tracking with automated data collection, improves payroll accuracy, and enables real-time tracking of workforce operations and analytics.

About the Project

The platform’s core processing system is responsible for IoT data ingestion, real-time processing, and advanced workforce scheduling logic.

The system provides real-time dashboards and analytics for operational decision-making.

Location: United States

Duration: long-term

Requirements

- 5+ years of commercial experience with PHP in backend development
- Strong expertise in Laravel and its ecosystem in production environments
- Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL, including optimization, indexing, and schema design
- Experience with Laravel Jobs and queue systems (Redis, SQS)
- Solid understanding of RESTful APIs and third-party integrations
- Experience with Eloquent ORM performance tuning and N+1 query prevention
- Familiarity with Docker and containerized development

Additional Requirements

- Strong understanding of SOLID principles and clean code practices
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail
- Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments
- Upper-Intermediate (B2+) English level for spoken communication

Responsibilities

- Design and implement scalable backend services and APIs
- Architect and evolve backend systems for high-load environments
- Optimize complex database queries to handle large volumes of real-time data
- Build and manage asynchronous processing using queues and background jobs
- Ensure reliable ingestion and processing of IoT-driven data streams
- Conduct code reviews and maintain high standards of code quality
- Refactor legacy components into modern, maintainable service patterns
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions

🇺🇦 Additional Notes

- We consider candidates both in Ukraine and abroad
- For specialists based in Ukraine, we provide the option of official booking (reservation)

📩 How to Apply

If you’re interested, please send us:

- Your CV/resume
- Your expected salary (gross)
- Confirmation of your spoken English level
- Your preferred contact method (Telegram is welcome, if convenient)

We’ll get back to you shortly with the next steps of the process.

title: DevSecOps Engineer
Technical Project Manager
description:

title: Affiliate Manager (iGaming)
description:
Affiliate Manager (iGaming) - Bring Your Network, Launch Day One

SoftVault is a B2B iGaming platform provider based in Limassol, Cyprus. We power turnkey, white-label, and crypto casino solutions for operators worldwide and we're scaling our own brands aggressively into Q3 2026.

We're looking for an Affiliate Manager who already has the relationships. Not someone who'll spend 6 months building a network from scratch - someone who can plug in their existing affiliate book on day one and start driving FTDs in week two.

About the role

You'll own the affiliate channel end-to-end: onboarding partners from your existing network, negotiating CPA / RevShare / hybrid deals, managing day-to-day relationships, and optimizing performance. You'll have full autonomy on deal structures within budget and direct access to me (Finn, the founder) for anything that needs fast sign-off.

GEOs and verticals

Our priority is LATAM — specifically Brazil and Mexico — with a strong focus on sportsbetting.

That said, we're open to applications from managers covering any GEO (Tier 1 EU, MENA, CIS, Asia, Africa) as long as you have a real, active affiliate book in that market. Casino-focused candidates are also welcome.

If you're a BR/MX sportsbook specialist with active super-affiliate relationships, you go straight to the top of our list.

What you bring

- A documented book of active affiliate relationships you can onboard immediately
- 2+ years managing affiliates in iGaming (casino, sportsbook, or both)
- Hands-on experience negotiating CPA, RevShare, and hybrid deals
- Comfort working independently and reporting on performance honestly
- Fluent English; Portuguese and/or Spanish is a major plus for the LATAM focus

Compensation

$3,000/month base + performance bonuses tied to the net revenue from your portfolio. Bonus structure is negotiable based on what you bring to the table — bring us a strong book and we'll build a package that rewards it properly. Top performers can realistically earn $6,000–$10,000+/month within 90 days.

How to apply

Don't send a generic CV. We'll skip those. In your application, please answer:

-  How many affiliates can you realistically onboard in the first 30 days?
-  Which GEOs and verticals does your network cover? (Be specific — "LATAM" is not an answer, "Brazil sportsbook tier-2 affiliates and 3 super-affiliates in Mexico" is.)
-  What deal structures do you typically work with? (CPA ranges, RevShare splits, hybrid setups)
-  What monthly affiliate budget have you managed in your last role?
-  One short paragraph: a deal or relationship you're proud of and why.

Apply with your CV and the answers above. We'll respond to every serious application within 5 business days.

title: CMDB Discovery Engineer
description:
We are seeking an experienced CMDB Discovery Software Engineer to join our consulting team for a high-visibility initiative with a major enterprise banking client.

Following a strategic migration from ServiceNow to Jira, the client is now optimizing their configuration management landscape. You will be the technical lead focused on automating and enriching Jira Assets using Lansweeper SaaS and other enterprise data sources.

The Role

This is a remote-first consulting assignment requiring occasional quarterly travel to Riga, Tallinn, or Vilnius. You will join a lean, expert team of 4–5 specialists to build a reliable, high-integrity "Golden Record" for the client’s enterprise assets.

Core Objectives:

- Lansweeper Optimization: Mature the configuration of Lansweeper SaaS to improve discovery coverage and data quality.
- Jira Assets Mastery: Design and manage object schemas, attributes, and complex import configurations within Jira Assets (formerly Insight).
- Data Reconciliation: Build logic to merge data from Active Directory, Intune, and cloud inventories, resolving conflicts and deduplicating records.

Must-Haves

CMDB & Data Modeling (4+ Years)

- Deep expertise in enterprise CMDB environments and configuration management.
- Strong grip on CI classes, relationship mapping, lifecycle models, and ownership structures.

Jira Assets Expertise (3+ Years)

- Hands-on experience with Jira Assets (Insight): object schemas, types, and automated import configurations.

Discovery & Lansweeper (3+ Years)

- Advanced proficiency with Lansweeper SaaS.
- Proven ability to configure network scanning, credentials, and scan targets.
- Skill in reducing "false positives" and improving hardware/software inventory consistency.

Integration & Reconciliation (3+ Years)

- Experience reconciling multiple sources (e.g., AD/Azure AD, Intune, MECM, Virtualization/Cloud inventories).
- Practical knowledge of matching rules, unique keys, and "Golden Record" design.

The Bonus List

- Industry: Experience in Enterprise Banking or highly regulated sectors.
- Project History: Background in CMDB migrations (specifically ServiceNow to Jira) or post-migration stabilization.
- Automation: Experience automating CMDB enrichment or security platform integrations (e.g., QRadar).
- Consulting Mindset: Ability to balance "in-the-weeds" execution with high-level pragmatic solution design.

title: Infrastructure Development Architect
description:
Remote · Full-Time · English async · Time Zones: CET +/- 2 hours · Reports to Founder

———————————————————————

ABOUT THE WORK

Riffbird is one of the largest social recruiting agencies in DACH, with 600 clients across Austria, Germany, and Switzerland. We run paid social campaigns, pre-qualify applicants on the phone, and operate the full hiring funnel for our clients.

The service works. The infrastructure does not. Today it runs on a patchwork of external SaaS tools held together by manual operator work. We're now bringing the operational layer in-house, piece by piece, and we're building it so LLM agents can do most of the work that humans currently do by clicking around.

You're coming in to build that layer. It's not a greenfield reinvention of recruiting software. It's the platform that turns an already-working service into something agents can run.

———————————————————————

WHAT YOU'LL BUILD

One platform, built around a single asset and a set of agents that operate on it.

THE DATA LAYER (the most important thing we own)

A unified candidate and client database. Every campaign, every screening call, every interview outcome feeds it. A candidate who doesn't fit Client A stays discoverable for Client B with proper consent. Full-text plus semantic search. This is the part of the business that's hardest to replicate from outside, and everything else on the platform exists to feed it, query it, or act on it.

THE AGENT WORKFORCE

The operational work we do today, moved one capability at a time onto agents that can run with human supervision:

• Ad creative generation (already live with Claude Code, gets expanded and integrated)

• Recruiting landing page generation, per client and per role

• Candidate research, active sourcing, and headhunting (LinkedIn, niche platforms, our own pool)

• Outbound qualification calls (telephony integration, region-by-region pitch and screening logic, full transcript and outcome tracking)

• Outreach and follow-up drafting

• Pipeline operations: moving candidates through stages, flagging stalled ones

• Reporting and anomaly detection across ad spend, funnel, and conversion

Our operators stay in charge of the work, the agents scale what they do. A capability moves from human-driven to agent-driven only when the evals back it up.

THE CLIENT WORKSPACE

Where our 600+ clients see their pipelines, get their reports, and talk to us. Multi-tenant, fast, clean. Today this is split across a stack of external tools and Slack, getting it in-house is step one.

THE AGENT PLATFORM

Typed, scoped tools, audit trails, eval pipelines, the infrastructure that lets us ship new agent capabilities without breaking client work. GDPR-clean throughout (German clients, German applicants, non-negotiable).

———————————————————————

WHAT YOU BRING

We don't care which language or framework you pick. We care that you've done the hard parts somewhere before:

• 5+ years shipping production systems where state, queues, webhooks, and idempotency actually mattered, not just CRUD over a single table

• Built and operated multi-tenant SaaS with a real permission model, not just WHERE tenant_id = ? stitched into every query

• Shipped LLM features in production where it had to work: RAG that retrieved the right thing, tool-calling that didn't hallucinate the schema, evals that caught regressions before users did

• Designed APIs and data models that agents can use without supervision, or at least understand what changes when the consumer is an LLM instead of a frontend

• Operate well in EU/GDPR territory, or have the discipline to learn it without us getting fined (in cooperation with our GDPR-expert)

• Async-remote operator: you write things down, you disagree in writing, you don't need standups

• Comfortable working directly with a founder who builds product himself with AI tools but isn't going to sparring-partner you on systems design. You own the engineering decisions, no PM in the middle.

———————————————————————

WHO YOU ARE

You're already living in this stuff. You read what comes out of Anthropic and OpenAI in real time, you've shipped with the APIs, you have opinions about which eval frameworks actually work and which are theater. This is the role you've been waiting for, not the role you applied to because the comp was good.

You move fast, but you've been burned enough times to know when fast is reckless. You can hold that trade-off.

You want your name on something real, not be engineer number 47 on someone else's feature team.

———————————————————————

NICE-TO-HAVE

• Recruiting, HR-tech, or staffing-software experience

• Hired and led small engineering teams before

• Voice, telephony, or RTC experience

• Strong opinions about agent UX (what a tool should and shouldn't expose to an LLM)

———————————————————————

WHAT YOU GET

• Greenfield, full ownership. You pick the architecture, you pick the tools. No legacy code, no committee, no permission slip.

• A founder who ships. Bernd (founder) uses Claude Code daily and builds production tooling himself. You get a counterpart who understands what you're doing, not someone managing you from outside.

• Above-market pay. We won't quote a band on the public posting, but we definitely pay properly for this role.

• The opportunity to take full responsibility of the system architecture short-term and build a team to support you long-term.

• Tooling and hardware budget that respects your craft. Premium AI subscriptions, top-spec machine, conference and training budget, trips to the Bay Area when there's a reason.

• Optional two retreats a year. Austria and Dubai. Proper time together with the founder and core team, not Zoom.

———————————————————————

HIRING PROCESS

1. 30-min intro call with Bernd (founder)

2. 60-min architecture conversation, no leetcode, never

3. Paid pair-programming or take-home on a real Riffbird problem (4 to 8h, paid at market rate)

4. References, decision, offer within 7 days

———————————————————————

title: Senior Flutter Engineer
description:
iOS and Android / Fully Remote
Full-time Contractor

About TWINii

TWINii is an expert-powered AI companion platform. We help the world's most trusted experts turn their voice, perspective, and body of work into an interactive AI twin their audience can talk to, any time. Personal, practical, scalable. A relationship, not a feed. A companion, not another app.

We are building the next layer of expert-audience connection. Not a feed to scroll, but a conversation you can apply. Our mission: give experts full consent and full ownership of their AI twin, backed by an architecture designed for depth, trust, and real intent.

Where We Are

Pre-launch. Funded. Engineering team of 6, based primarily in India. Mobile apps built in Flutter. The core product, voice and chat interaction with expert twins, is live internally. We are hiring the person who will own the mobile experience as we scale to public launch and beyond.

The Role

We need a Senior Flutter Developer who will own our mobile product end to end. This is not a ticket-taker role. You will be the technical authority on our iOS and Android apps, making architectural decisions, setting standards, and driving the mobile roadmap from planning through to production.

You will define how we build mobile at TWINii, not just for today's team, but for the team we are scaling into. That means auditing what exists, establishing the architecture and standards the next five engineers will work within, and making us faster as we grow, not slower.

Core Responsibilities

Technical Leadership. Own the mobile architecture. Make and document decisions on state management, navigation patterns, module structure, and platform integration strategy. You set the direction, you do not wait for it.

Project Ownership. Drive the mobile roadmap alongside product and design. Scope work, flag risks early, and deliver without needing to be managed.

Architecture Audit. Assess the current mobile codebase, identify structural weaknesses and technical debt, and build a clear roadmap to a more robust, scalable architecture.

Native Bridge Expertise. You do not just use packages. You modify them. You dive into Swift and Kotlin to fix what Flutter can not.

System-Level Awareness. iOS and Android app lifecycles, background execution limits, memory management, and threading.

Code Quality and Standards. Establish and enforce coding standards, review architecture and PRs, and ensure the codebase stays maintainable as the team grows.

Team Building. Define how the mobile team works: sprint cadences, PR review standards, branch strategy, release processes, and how we onboard new engineers.

Cross-Functional Guidance. Partner with product, AI, and backend teams to ensure mobile architecture is designed for features coming, not just features shipped.

UI Precision. Pixel-perfect interfaces that respect device-level realities.

Performance. Identify and eliminate memory leaks, jank, and bottlenecks.

Security. Handle platform-specific behaviours including permissions, notifications, and secure storage.

Required Technical Skills

- 5+ years of Flutter in production, 7+ years of professional mobile development overall
- Track record of leading a mobile project or team. You have been the person responsible for mobile output, not just a contributor
- Real-time communication integration: WebSockets, WebRTC, or LiveKit (or equivalent voice/video streaming SDKs)
- Audio and video playback/streaming on mobile
- Experience integrating AI/LLM-driven features on the client side
- Deep command of Dart: async programming, isolates, and streams
- Scale: proven experience handling apps with 100k+ concurrent sessions or viral spikes
- CI/CD: Fastlane, GitHub Actions, or Bitrise for automated mobile pipelines
- Experience hiring or growing a mobile engineering team (even 2 to 3 people)
- Communication: able to articulate technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders and push back constructively

What Senior Means at TWINii

This section matters to us. If it resonates, you are probably the right person.

You do not need a task list to know what to work on. You see what needs doing and you do it.

You have opinions on architecture and you can defend them with reasoning, not just preference.

You have shipped and maintained a product over time, not just built features and moved on.

You take ownership of outcomes, not just outputs. If something breaks in production, you are already investigating before anyone asks.

You make the people around you better. That is not optional, it is a core part of the role.

You have grown engineers around you. You have set standards that the team still follows after you stop enforcing them.

You have diagnosed a broken process or architecture and fixed it, not as a side project, but as part of your core job.

How to Apply

Email us with your CV and a link to a repository, portfolio, or high-quality apps you have shipped to the App Store or Play Store.

And answers to these three questions:

- Tell us about a time you went beyond the Flutter framework to solve a platform-specific issue.
- Tell us about an architectural decision that shaped a project: what you chose, why, and what you would do differently now.
- Tell us about a time you inherited a codebase or team that was not in great shape. What did you change first, why, and what was the result?

We value engineers who understand the OS under the hood and who lead with ownership.

title: Internal Communication and Engagement Lead
description:
Uklon — продуктова сервісна IT-компанія, розробник однойменного застосунку.

Заснована в Києві у 2010 році, сьогодні Uklon — це екосистема цифрових сервісів, що об’єднує райдхейлінг, доставку Uklon Delivery, рекламну платформу Uklon Ads та сервіс купівлі автобусних квитків Uklon Travel в єдиному застосунку. Станом на квітень 2026 року сервіс Uklon присутній у 28 містах України та на території туристичного комплексу Буковель. Також компанія оперує в Узбекистані в місті Ташкент.

Ми створюємо highload продукти, за якими ховаються амбітні технологічні челенджі, безперервні інновації та неочевидні ходи. Наш фреймворк роботи — тестувати нові гіпотези, пушити свої ідеї та використовувати останній стек технологій.

Приєднуйся до нас у ролі Internal Communication and Engagement Lead у м. Київ

Hiring process:

Знайомство, тестове завдання (ми цінуємо твою роботу та час, тому ТЗ оплачуємо) та технічна зустріч.

Що ми пропонуємо саме для цієї ролі:

• можливість побудувати цілісну екосистему внутрішніх комунікацій для одного з лідерів IT-ринку України

• пряма робота з C-level над формуванням ключових наративів та управлінням організаційними змінами

• карт-бланш на впровадження нових інструментів

• можливість оцифрувати культуру та приймати рішення на основі прозорих метрик залученості й аналітичних дашбордів

• стань ключовим медіатором, який синхронізує бізнес-стратегію із щоденним досвідом кожного співробітника

• робота в динамічному середовищі, де твої ідеї миттєво перетворюються на реальні проєкти та системні зміни

• річний бонус при виконанні цілей компанії

• занурення в культуру компанії, яка вважає кожного тіммейта значущим і цінним

• регулярний performance & salary review

• працювати в компанії, що входить до міжнародної групи VEON, представленої у сферах телекомунікацій, фінтеху, мобайлу, стримінгу, healthcare тощо

Як саме ти можеш впливати на розвиток компанії:

• формувати та розвивати системні культурні й engagement-програми, що підсилюють управлінські практики, командну взаємодію та якість внутрішнього досвіду співробітників

• формувати та впроваджувати системні підходи до внутрішніх комунікацій як управлінського інструменту на рівні всієї компанії, а не окремої функції

• будувати цілісну модель внутрішніх комунікацій як інструменту управління сенсами, пріоритетами та організаційною узгодженістю

• забезпечувати наскрізну узгодженість комунікацій між підрозділами (івенти, корпоративні комунікації, People Partners, бізнес-юніти) відповідно до єдиної моделі

• забезпечувати єдине інформаційне поле компанії та узгодженість між бізнес-стратегією, рішеннями лідерів і щоденним досвідом команд

• інтегрувати культурні ініціативи в операційну логіку компанії, переводячи їх з рівня окремих активностей у системні механіки

• формувати та масштабувати ключові наративи компанії, які підтримують стратегічні зміни, лідерські меседжі та залученість співробітників

• впроваджувати підходи й метрики, що дозволяють оцінювати ефективність внутрішніх комунікацій, engagement-програм і їх вплив на організаційну якість

Челенджі на три місяці:

• сформувати та погодити цільову модель внутрішніх комунікацій (канали, ролі, процеси, governance) і запустити її базові елементи в роботі

• впровадити єдиний процес управління комунікаційними запитами з прозорою чергою та статусами для бізнесу

• впровадити правила роботи каналів як єдиної системи з контролем дублювання, якості та частоти комунікацій

• запустити регулярний цикл роботи з C-level (планування ключових наративів + синхронізація меседжів)

Челенджі на півроку:

• впровадити цілісну модель внутрішніх комунікацій як єдину систему роботи

• запустити системну recognition-програму з чіткою логікою, механіками та інтеграцією в щоденний досвід співробітника

• запустити єдину платформу управління подіями та ініціативами (event hub): календар, реєстрація, комунікація та аналітика участі для всієї компанії
• впровадити систему метрик внутрішніх комунікацій та програм з регулярною аналітикою і прийняттям рішень на основі даних

• впровадити систему аналітичних дашбордів для внутрішніх комунікацій та engagement-програм: ключові метрики, регулярний моніторинг та прозорість для стейкхолдерів

• досягти вимірюваних результатів: зниження дублюючих комунікацій, підвищення open rate / engagement, зменшення хаотичних запитів від бізнесу

Для досягнення результатів, тобі знадобляться:

• 5+ років досвіду у внутрішніх комунікаціях, employee engagement або суміжних комунікаційних HR-функціях

• досвід побудови системи внутрішніх комунікацій

• досвід роботи з C-level та управління наративами

• досвід підтримки організаційних змін та трансформацій через комунікації

• досвід розробки та масштабування культурних і engagement-програм як системних ініціатив

• досвід роботи з різними ринками та мультикультурним середовищем

• досвід управління командою та крос-функціональними проєктами

• сильні навички побудови комунікаційних кампаній

• Data-driven підхід та робота з метриками

• високий рівень системного мислення та ownership

• англійська - Advanced

• досвід роботи в продуктових або tech-компаніях буде перевагою

Як ти регулюєш свій робочий час?

• гнучкий графік з урахуванням функціоналу

• days off зі збереженням винагороди: 20 на особисті потреби, ще 1 з нагоди дня народження, 10 через хворобу, до 8-ми за донацію крові

Як ти будеш прокачувати свої скіли в Uklon?

• внутрішній обмін знаннями, програми менторства та тренінги з розвитку soft та hard skills

• отримання профільних сертифікацій для IT-експертів

• корпоративна бібліотека та підписки на інформаційні ресурси

• персональний/командний бюджет на навчання

• корпоративні знижки та компенсація English lessons

• long-term навчання для керівників

Care and support

• медичне страхування в Україні

• оплачувані сесії з психотерапевтами Pleso

• гейміфікації, подарунки, розіграші та знижки від партнерів

• спортивні заходи та корпоративні тімбілдінги

• wellness programs (воркшопи емоційної підтримки)

• тижні масажу в офісі в Києві

• промокоди на поїздки з Uklon

Regular Sport Activities:

• Uklon Football щотижня

• Uklon Online & Offline Yoga щотижня

• корпоративні знижки, часткова компенсація занять спортом

Corporate social responsibility

Uklon соціально відповідальний бізнес і входить в ТОП-10 найбільших донаторів на підтримку сил оборони та гуманітарні ініціативи серед українського бізнесу в секторі ІТ та телекомунікацій.

З початку повномасштабного вторгнення сума фінансових внесків компанії та її засновників на підтримку Сил оборони, соціальні ініціативи та благодійні проєкти склала понад 339 мільйонів гривень.

Перед поданням заявки на відкриту позицію в Uklon, будь ласка, ознайомтеся з [Умовами обробки та захисту персональних даних кандидатів](https://careers.uklon.net/zgoda-ua). Надсилаючи нам свої персональні дані, зокрема ті, що містяться у вашому резюме, ви даєте згоду на обробку персональних даних відповідно до цих Умов.

*Ми цінуємо кожен відгук і прагнемо надати зворотний зв’язок протягом 7 робочих днів. Якщо відповіді не було - не засмучуйся: просто цього разу метч із вакансією не відбувся.

Якщо не бачиш листа від нас - перевір, будь ласка, папку «Спам» чи інші вкладки пошти. Іноді наші відповіді потрапляють туди. Дякуємо, що обираєш Uklon. До зустрічі!

title: Ruby on Rails Developer
description:
Cropwise Operations is a global leader in digital agritech solutions, operating in over 50 countries and helping optimize business processes and improve the efficiency of agronomic decision-making.

We are looking for a skilled Ruby on Rails Developer to join our team.

What we expect from a candidate:

- Preferably 3+ years of Ruby on Rails development experience.

- Strong knowledge of Rails.

- Experience with testing frameworks like RSpec and Capybara.

- Testing with RSpec/Capybara.

- Basic knowledge of ES6 + React.js.

- Experience with JavaScript.

- Standard Rails application deployment stack (Git, CI, Capistrano, *nix).

- Knowledge of HTML/CSS.

What exactly will you need to work with:

- Backend on Ruby on Rails 7.0 (Ruby 3.2).

- PostgreSQL + PostGIS database (handling large geospatial datasets).

- Job processing with Resque + Redis.

- Testing on RSpec + Capybara + CI.

- Partially frontend on React.js (ES6, JSX).

What else can you work with?

- Algorithms for processing large amounts of geodata.

- Reception and processing of binary data (Ruby eventmachine).

- Working with RabbitMQ.

- AWS, Google Cloud, Kubernetes.

- Visualization and work with geodata on the frontend (Mapbox GL JS).

Hiring process:

- Intro call;

- Test Task;

- Final Interview;

- Offer.

The company offers:

- Opportunity to be a part of a best-in-class product that is used by thousands of companies around the world.

- Participation in complex technical tasks and challenges.

- Environment where you need to seek and implement unique engineering and technical solutions.

- Trainings and development programs.

- Flexible work formats: remote, office or hybrid.

- Health and life insurance for employees and your family members.

- 32 working days of paid annual leave and sick leave.

About Cropwise Operations

Cropwise Operations is a SaaS platform for farmers, leveraging cutting-edge technologies such as computer vision, big data, and AI to deliver actionable insights and improve agricultural outcomes.

For seekers, cooperation with Cropwise Operations is an opportunity to be part of a best-in-class product used by hundreds of companies around the world, and to deal with complex technical tasks in the field of neural networks and machine learning with the need to constantly improve their knowledge and skills, to find and implement unique engineering and technical solutions.

title: AI-Driven Full Stack Developer (PHP + React)
description:
We are looking for an AI-driven Full Stack Developer to join our team building next-generation healthcare infrastructure.

You’ll work on products focused on credentialing, compliance, staffing, provider workflows, and operational automation. We move fast, ship often, and use AI deeply across engineering and product workflows.

This is not a traditional engineering role. We are looking for builders with strong product thinking, ownership mentality, and experience working with modern AI tooling.

What we’re building

- AI-powered credentialing workflows
- Provider identity and compliance infrastructure
- Healthcare staffing and hiring tools
- Facility workflow systems
- Secure access and document management
- Intelligent automation for healthcare organizations

What you'll do

- Build full stack applications using PHP/Laravel and React/TypeScript
- Design scalable REST APIs and backend services
- Develop modern frontend architecture and reusable UI components
- Work with PostgreSQL and scalable data models
- Build asynchronous workflows using AWS SQS, RabbitMQ, or Kafka
- Contribute to AI-native automation and workflow systems
- Collaborate closely with product, design, and engineering
- Participate in architecture and technical decision-making
- Own features end-to-end, from idea to production
- Write clean, maintainable, production-ready code
- Help improve engineering standards and platform scalability

What we’re looking for

- 4+ years of full stack development experience
- Strong PHP and Laravel experience
- Strong React and TypeScript experience
- Experience building and integrating REST APIs
- Solid PostgreSQL knowledge
- Experience with asynchronous systems and queues
- Strong understanding of scalable architecture
- Comfortable working in fast-moving startup environments
- Strong ownership mentality and proactive mindset
- Product thinking, not just implementation skills
- Ability to move fast, learn quickly, and adapt constantly
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills
- English level B2+

We actively use Claude and AI-assisted engineering workflows every day. This is a core part of our development culture.

AI tools already cover much of routine engineering work. We are looking for engineers who can think critically, make product decisions, improve systems, and drive execution.

You should already have experience with:

- AI-assisted development
- agentic workflows
- AI-driven debugging and architecture
- rapid iteration using modern AI tools

Responsibilities may also include:

- designing UI components and product flows using AI tools
- improving UX and feature usability
- taking full ownership of features and delivery

Nice to have

- Experience with AWS infrastructure
- Experience with Python
- Experience building AI-enabled products
- Frontend performance optimization
- Experience with testing frameworks
- Understanding of accessibility and modern UI/UX practices

Why join us?

- Build technology that solves real healthcare problems
- Work on an AI-first platform with ambitious vision
- Influence architecture and product direction
- Work with a strong, mission-driven team
- Remote-friendly and flexible culture
- Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling company

title: Business Analyst
description:
We are looking for a strong Senior Business Analyst / System Analyst who can structure complex business processes, translate operational and product needs into clear requirements for the development team, and act as a key link between business, product, and engineering.

This role is for someone who can deeply understand processes, identify dependencies between system modules, quickly navigate complex scenarios, and turn them into a logical, clear, and implementable structure.

Product: a ticketing / event-tech platform for the European market within the e-commerce domain, with multiple integrations, operational scenarios, automations, and AI-driven processes.

---------------------------------------------------------------

Requirements

- 5+ years of experience in IT as a Business Analyst / System Analyst / Product Owner
- Experience with complex systems, multi-module products, or enterprise solutions
- Experience with e-commerce products, marketplaces, transactional platforms, or products with multiple user and operational scenarios
- Understanding of e-commerce processes: user journey, checkout, orders, payments, refunds, availability / inventory, notifications, customer support flows
- Experience analyzing and documenting interactions between modules, services, APIs, and external integrations
- Understanding of SDLC and Agile / Scrum / Kanban principles
- Ability to quickly structure large volumes of unstructured information
- Experience documenting business processes, user flows, use cases, system logic, and interaction scenarios
- Experience creating documentation: BRD, SRS, User Stories, Use Cases, BPMN, workflow diagrams
- Ability to translate business requests into clear development tasks
- Experience with Confluence, Jira, Miro, Draw.io, Figma, or similar tools
- Experience with AI tools or AI-driven processes for analysis, information structuring, documentation automation, or workflow optimization
- Systems thinking, strong self-organization, ownership, and communication skills

---------------------------------------------------------------

Nice to Have

- Experience in ticketing / event-tech / event management / entertainment / booking systems
- Experience with products for the European market
- Experience in fintech, SaaS, or enterprise products
- Experience as an Operational BA or Enterprise Systems Analyst
- Experience launching new products, modules, or internal transformation projects
- Experience with high-load operational products or systems with a large number of transactions and integrations
- Understanding of payment flows, fraud checks, invoices, reporting, or customer support automation
- Hands-on experience with LLM tools, chatbots, scoring systems, or internal AI tools

---------------------------------------------------------------

Responsibilities

- Analyze, structure, and document business requirements and processes
- Identify weak points in current processes and suggest improvements
- Prepare technical specifications, user stories, workflow diagrams, BPMN, and other project documentation
- Describe system logic, module interactions, services, and integrations
- Decompose complex business tasks into clear stages for the development team
- Collaborate with product, operations, and engineering teams
- Participate in designing new features, modules, automations, and AI-driven solutions
- Maintain and develop the product knowledge base
- Prepare diagrams, mockups, flows, and user scenario descriptions
- Participate in discovery phases for new products and internal transformation projects
- Ensure consistency between business needs and technical implementation

---------------------------------------------------------------

Working Conditions

- Remote work format
- Paid vacation and sick leave
- Minimal bureaucracy and fast decision-making
- Direct collaboration with the product and key decision makers
- Opportunity to influence process architecture and product development
- Result-oriented and growth-focused team
- Competitive salary
- Work in a Ukrainian product company actively scaling in the European market

title: Partner Success Manager
description:
We are looking for a proactive and relationship-driven Partner Success Manager to build, develop, and monetise Tallium's partner ecosystem.
This is a key strategic role at the intersection of business development, account management, and B2B marketing.

As PSM, you will be responsible for identifying and onboarding new partners, activating their potential, maintaining long-term relationships, and turning the partner channel into a reliable source of new projects, resources, and revenue. You will own the full partner lifecycle — from prospecting and first meeting to ongoing nurturing and co-sales activities.

Traits of Environment

- Highly competitive IT services market with a focus on web, mobile, and AI development
- Complex B2B partnership dynamics involving agencies, consultants, and niche tech companies
- Diverse service portfolio requiring tailored partner value propositions
- Focus on building long-term, trust-based partner relationships
- Outbound-driven partner acquisition as a primary growth channel
- Fast-growing company with a strong emphasis on process automation and efficiency.

Responsibilities

- Identify, onboard, and manage technology and business partners to expand Tallium's expertise, resource pool, and market reach.
- Build and maintain a structured partner pipeline in CRM; segment partners by type, expertise, size, and collaboration stage.
- Launch automated outreach campaigns to attract new partners via LinkedIn, Email, and other channels.
- Conduct gap analysis of the partner base; identify missing capabilities and uncover mutual value opportunities.
- Lead re-engagement initiatives for dormant partners; find new touchpoints and collaboration formats.
- Develop and evolve the partner offering: define what value Tallium brings beyond price and how to communicate it effectively.
- Organise co-marketing and co-sales activities: case study exchanges, joint content, cross-promotions, and joint tender participation.
- Monitor partner news and job openings; proactively propose flexible collaboration models.
- Maintain Tallium's visibility in the partner landscape through corporate social media and personal branding.
- Track and report key partner channel metrics: pipeline health, activation rate, sourced opportunities, and revenue contribution.

Requirements

- 2-3+ years of experience in partner management, business development, or B2B account management.
- C1+ English proficiency (written and spoken).
- Strong communication and relationship-building skills; ability to earn trust at various levels.
- Experience with CRM systems and pipeline management.
- Self-organized, proactive, and result-oriented with strong analytical thinking.
- Understanding of IT services landscape and delivery models (staffing, outsourcing, subcontracting).
- Experience in IT Services B2B Sales & Partnerships Management will be a big plus.

Will be a plus:

- Experience with outbound outreach tools (LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, Smartlead, Reply.io, etc.).
- Familiarity with automation tools (Make, Zapier, n8n) and AI-assisted workflows.
- Experience in co-marketing activities, content creation, or partner enablement.

Project Team:

CEO / CBDO / Head of Sales / BDR / Lead Gen Manager / Database Analyst / Business Analyst.

Please note!
We review all applications received, but only respond to candidates whose experience and skills we believe best match the position's requirements. We appreciate your understanding.

title: Middle Graphic Designer
description:
[PlantIn](https://plantinteam.com/) — продуктова IT-компанія з екосистеми Genesis, що зближує користувачів з їхніми захопленнями шляхом створення продуктів на основі Machine Learning. Наші застосунки об’єднують понад 55 млн людей у всьому світі.

Переходь на [наш сайт](https://plantinteam.com/), щоб дізнатися більше про компанію.

Наші продукти:

PlantIn — застосунок №1 на ринку США для ідентифікації рослин та допомоги у піклуванні про них. PlantIn дозволяє створювати персоналізовані плани догляду, консультуватися з ботаніками та спілкуватися у глобальній спільноті любителів рослин.

CoinIn — застосунок для ідентифікації та визначення вартості монет та банкнот. Він дає миттєвий доступ до повної інформації про монети й банкноти та поради з догляду за колекцією.

Також компанія активно розвиває напрям R&D для розробки нових застосунків у ніші хобі.

Ми активно створюємо нові продукти в ніші хобі та колекціонування, тому зараз підсилюємо нашу креативну команду. Шукаємо Middle Graphic Designer, який/яка допоможе нам посилити дизайн-напрямок і системно закривати маркетингові, SMM та бренд-дизайн задачі.

Відправляй своє резюме і портфоліо, та ставай частиною нашої команди!
Важливо: робота передбачає гібридний формат у Києві.

Що ти будеш робити:

- Створювати статичні рекламні креативи для продуктів компанії.
- Адаптувати дизайни під різні продукти, цільові аудиторії, локалі та канали комунікації.
- Створювати візуал для SMM-команди: Instagram-розкладки, статичні пости, банери, обкладинки.
- Розробляти дизайн маркетингових матеріалів: лендинги, quiz landings, paywalls, промо-матеріали (зокрема, працювати з конструктором лендингів).
- Працювати над брендингом компанії: мерч, офісні матеріали, івенти, презентації.
- Розвивати шаблони, UI Design System та наповнювати базу AI-ассетів.
- Тестувати та інтегрувати AI-інструменти для створення статичних матеріалів.
Наш ідеальний метч має:

- Досвід роботи в дизайні від 2-х років.
- Впевнений рівень володіння Figma, Adobe Photoshop та Illustrator.
- Досвід створення статичних рекламних креативів (digital/performance marketing) та роботи з SMM-форматами.
- Досвід створення графіки для лендингів, вебквізів, paywalls, onboarding-матеріалів, а також розуміння принципів UX/UI та адаптації дизайну під веб.
- Знання композиції, типографіки, кольору, ієрархії та візуальної структури.
- Базове розуміння бренд-дизайну та роботи з брендованими матеріалами.
- Практичний досвід використання AI-інструментів (Midjourney, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Figma AI тощо).
- Хорошу надивленість у digital design, рекламі, сучасній візуальній комунікації та вміння працювати з референсами.
- Вміння готувати макети до передачі в розробку або подальшу адаптацію.
- Високий рівень самоорганізованості, уважність до деталей, проактивність та здатність комфортно почуватися в рутинних та операційних задачах за брифом.
Буде перевагою:

-

Досвід роботи з performance marketing задачами, SMM-дизайном та брендованими матеріалами.

-

Розуміння принципів Conversion Rate (CR).

-

Досвід роботи з дизайн-системами, шаблонами та UI-kit.

-

Досвід використання AI для генерації, ресерчу та оптимізації дизайн-процесів.

Що тебе чекає в PlantIn?

- Розвивай українські ML-based продукти, які вже здобули успіх у світі.
- Занурся в атмосферу карʼєрного росту. У нас можна взяти на себе новий напрям чи протестувати та втілити зміни власноруч.
- Долучайся до like-minded команди з власними традиціями. Наша атмосфера сприяє відкритості та довірі.
- Переконайся, що твої рішення та дії впливають на продукт і компанію – 88% плантінівців це підтверджують.
Наші бенефіти

- Медстрахування, масаж, корпоративний лікар;
- Гнучкий графік роботи: починай робочий день з 9:00 до 11:00;
- 20 робочих днів відпустки, 100% оплата безлімітних лікарняних;
- Система заохочення та визнання Pando: розвивайся та долучайся до життя команди, отримуй за це бали та обмінюй їх на нагороди;
- Безкоштовні сніданки, обіди та снеки у просторому офісі на Подолі;
- Сучасна техніка для роботи;
- Компенсація спорту, психотерапії та навчання;
- Доступ до профільних спільнот Genesis та внутрішнього навчання.
Ставай частиною нашої команди, адже ми об'єднані, щоб зростати – заряджені, щоб змінювати. Це можна побачити в наших командних [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/plantin.team/), [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/myplantin/) та [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@plantin.team).

title: Middle/Senior Backend Developer (WebRTC, Python)
description:

We are developing modern SoftPhone applications for Android, iOS, and a WebRTC client, designed as an extension of our core product PortaSwitch — a Class 4 & Class 5 SIP softswitch platform.
This role offers a unique opportunity to work closely with PortaSwitch, collaborate with an experienced engineering team, grow your expertise in VoIP telephony, and contribute to a live, actively evolving product.

Team Setup
You will join a team of 7 professionals:

- 1 Project Manager
- 1 Senior Developer Lead
- 3 Mobile Developers
- 1 Web Developer
- 1 Backend Developer

Key Responsibilities

- Design and develop the server-side backend of the WebTrit system
- Build scalable, high-performance solutions supporting real-time communication services
-

Collaborate with mobile and web teams to deliver seamless product functionality

Required Skills & Experience

- Python (strong backend development experience)
- Solid knowledge of Phoenix and Ecto
- Strong knowledge / hands-on experience with WebRTC
- Experience with PostgreSQL
- Proven experience building backend services in production

Nice to Have

- Elixir (2+ years of commercial experience)

English Level

-

Written English is sufficient for day-to-day communication

We offer:

title: Technical Specialist
description:
Втомився від того, що техчастина «лежить», а баїнг стоїть без діла? Шукаємо Technical Specialist, який стане сполучною ланкою між оффером та байєром. Твоя задача — зробити так, щоб все працювало як годинник: від реєстрації домену до коректного прокидання ліда в CRM.

Це про тебе, якщо ти:

-

Знаєш Keitaro краще, ніж свою квартиру.

-

Не боїшся консолі сервера і розумієш, чому вилітає 502 помилка.

-

Можеш швидко "вилікувати" лендинг, що поїхав, або змінити форму за 5 хвилин.

-

Розумієш шлях кліка від рекламного кабінету до виплати в ПП.

Що потрібно буде робити:

1. Трекінг та Keitaro:

-

Створення кампаній, налаштування потоків та редіректів.

-

Робота з токенами, макросами та передачею clickid / subid.

-

Налаштування складних постбеків та діагностика втрат трафіку.

2. Інфраструктура (Сервери та Домени):

-

Налаштування VPS/Linux, робота з DNS (Cloudflare), випуск SSL.

-

Розгортання сайтів на Nginx/Apache, робота з правами доступу та логами.

-

Масовий пошук, реєстрація та прив'язка доменів під запуски.

3. Робота з контентом (Landing Pages):

-

Викачування та адаптація лендингів/прелендингів під різні гео.

-

Чистка коду від чужих скриптів, заміна форм, інтеграція через API/Webhooks.

-

Дрібні правки по фронтенду (змінити блоки, кнопки, тексти).

4. Інтеграції з FB/Google:

-

Встановлення та перевірка пікселів, налаштування подій.

-

Робота з Conversion API (CAPI), щоб ні один лід не загубився.

-

Перевірка UTM-міток та коректності посилань перед заливом.

Що ми пропонуємо:

-

Технічний виклик: робота з великими об'ємами даних та різними вертикалями.

-

Ресурси: жодної економії на інструментах (трекери, сервери, проксі — все топ-рівня).

-

Команда: адекватні байєри, які цінують твою роботу, та відсутність бюрократії.

-

Гнучкість: повний ремаут або офіс — головне результат.

title: Middle/Senior Penetration Tester
description:
Iterasec works with clients worldwide, helping them find vulnerabilities and secure their products. Our projects range from mobile/web applications to complex modern cloud and automotive stacks. We work with both small product companies as well as Fortune 500 enterprises.

We are looking for a Middle/Senior Security Consultant / Penetration tester to work on and lead penetration testing and vulnerability/cloud security assessment projects.

In this role, you will work on technically challenging projects and also spend some time leading/mentoring our junior pentesting colleagues.

Required skills

- 1.5+ years of intensive commercial experience

- OSCP, eWPTx2 or similar would be a plus

- Scripting/coding skills and being comfortable with advanced pentesting tooling

- Strong knowledge of mobile/web security

- Comfortable with cloud and container security

- Basic RE skills

- Ability to mentor/lead colleagues

- Strong ability and drive to learn and develop cybersecurity skills

- Technical English (Intermediate+)

We offer

- Good salary + bonus system

- Diverse project portfolio and technologies to work with

- Rewarding environment: brilliant team ready to share knowledge and collaborate

- Courses and conferences which are relevant to the position are sponsored by the company.

- We are a remote-first company with full WFH support and a flexible work schedule.

Responsibilities

- Participate in various pentesting projects

- Lead junior colleagues

- Perform threat modeling in pentesting and security assessment projects

- Create assessment documentation and reports, clearly identifying vulnerabilities and associated remediation steps

- Consult clients on efficient issues remediation

- Conduct security researches

- Develop tools and scripts to automate and improve current pentesting processes

title: RevOps Automation Engineer
description:
We're on a mission to reform the education system and create opportunities that surpass a traditional college education. While the average US college grad earns $50K/year, our students who apply themselves average $5K/month in sales within their first 6 months with us.

We deliver this through 1-on-1 mentorship, an active community, and a course taught by coaches who are actively running Amazon businesses today.

We've been in business since 2022, scaled past a $1.5M annual run rate in 2025, and our 12-month target is $5M ARR. We're 15+ full-time and growing fast. Our founder has built and shared this journey publicly to 260K+ followers.

We move fast, we hold each other to a standard, and we believe revenue directly reflects impact.

The Role

We're hiring a RevOps & Business Systems Manager to own the systems, automation, and operational backbone of our business.

You'll be the person who makes our sales & marketing engine run flawlessly, our customer success motion operate without friction, our financial systems stay clean, and our new hires onboard seamlessly. Every automation that touches this business will be yours to build, own, and improve.

This is a builder role, not a strategy seat. You'll be in Make, N8N, GHL, Close, Airtable, and Claude every single day shipping automations that move the business forward.

If you love connecting tools, designing workflows, and watching chaos turn into clean repeatable systems — and you want to do it inside a high-performance team scaling to $5M ARR — this is for you.

What You'll Own

-

Sales & Marketing — Our CRMs (GoHighLevel + Close.io), marketing automation in ActiveCampaign, server-side tracking via CAPIs, no-show recovery flows, and the full funnel dashboards leadership runs the business on.

-  Customer Success — The entire student journey from post-close kickoff through milestones and renewals, plus at-risk detection, engagement automations, and support workflows.
-

Financial Systems — Integrations between QuickBooks, our CRMs, and payment processors, plus commission tracking and financial dashboards for leadership.

-

New Hire Onboarding — Automated workflows for every advisor, triager, and ops hire — account provisioning, training paths, and SOPs that get people productive in days, not weeks.

-

New Product Launches — Partner with leadership on every new product or service we ship — funnel, landing pages, tracking, CRM flows, attribution, fulfillment handoffs. End to end.

Tech Stack

You'll work in (and should already know most of these well):

- Automation: Make, N8N, Zapier, Slack
- AI: Claude, OpenAI, AI-powered automation workflows
- CRMs: GoHighLevel, Close.io
- Marketing: ActiveCampaign
- Data: Airtable, Google Sheets
- Financial: QuickBooks
- Web: WordPress, basic HTML
- Integrations: Webhooks, Calendly, API connections
-

Tracking: Meta CAPI, TikTok Events API, Google Enhanced Conversions

What We're Looking For

Must have:

- 3+ years of hands-on experience building automations and owning systems in a business operations / RevOps / automation engineering role
- Deep, hands-on experience with Make and/or N8N — you've personally built complex multi-step automations with error handling, branching logic, and webhooks
- Strong experience in at least one CRM (GoHighLevel or Close.io preferred; HubSpot or similar acceptable)
- Working knowledge of server-side conversion tracking (CAPIs) — you've actually set these up, not just heard of them
- Fluent with AI tools and Claude — you use them daily to ship faster and build smarter automations
- Comfort with webhooks, APIs, and basic HTML — you don't get stuck when an integration needs custom work
-

Process-driven thinker who spots inefficiency and ships clean solutions

Strong-fit signals:

- Fluency in both GHL AND Close.io
- Background in coaching, info-products, agencies, or high-ticket sales operations
- QuickBooks integrations and financial automation experience
- ActiveCampaign deep experience
- N8N self-hosted setup experience
-

Have launched 5+ new products/funnels from scratch

You Shouldn't Apply If

- You currently have (or want to keep) multiple clients this is a full-time, all-in role. We're not hiring a freelancer or one of several engagements. If you're not ready to focus 100% on this role, it isn't for you.
- You're looking for a passive, low-pressure environment
- You can't take direct feedback without taking it personally
- You've used these tools but never actually built end-to-end systems with them

title: Marketing Analyst
description:
We are building one of the most powerful live-streaming platforms, already connecting 400K+ monthly active users through live events, interactive video chats, and real-time community experiences. Our mission is bold: bring joy, fight loneliness, and deliver safe, ad-free entertainment that keeps people coming back.
This is a complex, fast-moving space, and we love it that way! So, you will join a passionate, expert team tackling everything from scaling AI-powered recommendations to launching high-impact, data-driven features that boost monetization and engagement. Every idea counts here, and every release reaches a massive global audience.
We are now expanding into Arab countries and Europe, enhancing content quality, and rolling out new features to keep users hooked. We are among the Top 5 streaming products in the US and rank in the Top 10 worldwide. Our next milestone: break into the global Top 5, and we are moving fast to make it happen

About the role: In this role, you will turn numbers into insights, ensuring our marketing stays sharp and effective. From analysing campaign efficiency to connecting marketing and product analytics, you’ll spot growth opportunities and track performance with precision. Your work will directly influence data-driven decisions, keeping our marketing activities stable, scalable, and impactful. With strong results, you’ll also have the opportunity to grow in seniority and potentially lead the department in the future.

In this role, you will

- Analyze paid marketing campaigns across multiple channels, regions, creatives
- Build regular reports and provide ad-hoc analytics on marketing effectiveness (CAC, ROI, LTV, attribution).
- Connect marketing data with product metrics to measure the true business impact of campaigns.
- Monitor marketing funnel health and detect anomalies or drops in performance.
- Collaborate with product analysts, marketers, and data engineers to improve data pipelines and tracking.
- Provide actionable insights and recommendations to optimize campaigns and budget allocation.

It’s all about you

- Experience collaborating with marketing and product teams to monitor key performance metrics, identify anomalies or performance issues, and communicate actionable insights to managers for decision-making.
- Strong SQL
- Strong problem identification skills with critical thinking and a clear understanding of cause-and-effect relationships.
- Proficiency in BI tools (Tableau, Looker, or similar).
- Solid understanding of marketing metrics (CAC, ROI, LTV, ARPU, retention) and attribution models (last-click, multi-touch)
- Good communication skills to translate complex findings into business recommendations

Would be a plus

- Familiarity with Python and basic understanding of ML
- Usage of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude AI, Gemini, etc) on a daily basis

What we offer

Care and support:

- 20 paid vacation days, 15 sick days, and 6 additional days off for family events
- Up to 10 additional days off for public holidays
- 100% medical insurance coverage
- Sports and equipment reimbursement
- Team building events, corporate gifts, and stylish merch
- Financial and legal support
- Position retention and support for those who join the Armed Forces of Ukraine
- Participation in social initiatives supporting Ukraine

Comfortable working environment:

- Work from our Kyiv hub or remotely with a flexible schedule
- Workspace rental reimbursement in other cities and abroad
- Modern equipment or depreciation of your own tools

Investment in your future:

- Collaborate with a highly-skilled team of Middle & Senior professionals, sharing practical cases and expertise in the social networking niche
- 70% of our heads and leads have grown into their roles here — so can you!
- Performance-oriented reviews and Individual Development Plans (IDPs)
- Reimbursement for professional courses and English classes
- Corporate library, book club, and knowledge-sharing events

Hiring process

- Intro call
- Technical interview
- Reference check
- Offer

title: Head of Engineering
description:
Who we are:

We’re a Ukrainian multi-product company building powerful tools for database management, data connectivity, and productivity — trusted by over 500,000 users across 120 countries. Since 1997, we have been streamlining data workflows for professionals and teams with our intuitive and efficient software products.

We’re committed to enhancing the experience of our customers across the globe by minimizing data-related tasks and enabling them to focus on more inspiring goals. Among our clients, you can find such legends as Microsoft Corporation, Oracle America, IBM, Intel, and many other companies that deserve their place in Fortune-100 and Fortune-500.

Whether it’s global companies or individuals, we provide a customer-centric approach, delivering high-quality solutions and exceptional support.

Driven by passion, we play a substantial role in shaping the future of data management

Product that needs your engagement:

Mobion is a cloud-based white-label platform for ride-hailing and corporate transport services. Launched in 2016 by Devart, it supports operators in 6+ countries and has handled over 20 million rides for 4M+ users and 500K drivers.

Our ecosystem includes rider and driver apps, a real-time dispatch system, admin dashboards, and branded web portals — all backed by a secure, scalable Azure infrastructure. We offer both SaaS and franchise models to help partners grow fast across regions.

Your mission:

As Head of Engineering at Mobion, your mission is to transform engineering into a true strategic growth engine — not just a delivery function.

You will architect the technological foundation that enables Mobion to scale across countries, handle millions of rides reliably, and continuously reduce time-to-market in a highly competitive mobility space.

This is a role for a builder and a system thinker.
You will design a scalable, future-proof platform, elevate engineering standards, and cultivate a high-performance organization where ownership, speed, and technical excellence coexist.

You won’t simply lead teams — you will define how engineering shapes product innovation, operational efficiency, and long-term business advantage.

The impact you will make:

-  Technical Strategy & Alignment
Define and own the long-term technical vision aligned with Mobion’s growth strategy (SaaS+ Franchise expansion). Translate business objectives into scalable architecture and execution roadmaps. Act as a strategic partner to the Head of BU and Product leadership.
-  Architecture & Innovation
Lead high-level architectural decisions for a distributed, real-time ride-hailing ecosystem (dispatch, mobile apps, admin tools, APIs). Ensure platform scalability, performance, and resilience under growing load and regional expansion.
Drive Buy vs. Build decisions and continuously evolve the tech stack.
-  AI & Automation Strategy
Lead the integration of AI-driven capabilities into the product and engineering workflows, including:
-Demand prediction & dynamic pricing optimization
-Smart dispatch & route optimization
-Fraud detection & anomaly monitoring
-AI-assisted development (code review automation, test generation, performance analysis)
Build a roadmap for leveraging AI to improve both customer value and internal engineering productivity.
-  Engineering Leadership & Team Growth
Own hiring, onboarding, and retention strategies. Define competency frameworks, career paths, and drive continuous growth of engineering talent and knowledge sharing.
-  Operational Performance & Delivery Excellence
Set KPIs for engineering leads, run performance reviews, and own PDPs. Optimize the SDLC to ensure predictable delivery, quality, reliability, and security.
-  Culture & Ways of Working
Foster a culture of ownership, accountability, and technical excellence. Champion Agile/Scrum and DevOps best practices across teams.
-  Resources, Budget & Operations
Plan and manage engineering resources, capacity, budgets, and vendor relationships.
-  Reliability, Security & Compliance
Act as the final escalation point for critical incidents. Ensure robust incident management, disaster recovery, and compliance with security and data protection standards (Fintech / Ride-hailing).

Your future challenges:

- Scaling Mobion to new countries while maintaining architectural integrity
- Improving estimation accuracy and predictability across teams
- Reducing time-to-market without increasing technical debt
- Managing platform complexity as the product ecosystem grows
- Implementing AI-driven features in a way that delivers real business value
- Ensure platform reliability (SLA/SLO), system scalability, incident reduction
- Strengthening cross-functional collaboration between Engineering, Product, and Operations
- Building a strong second layer of engineering leadership

We’re looking for someone who:

- Has 5+ years of experience in software engineering, including 2+ years in a senior leadership role (e.g., VP of Engineering, CTO, Head of Engineering), ideally within high-load systems or the ride-hailing / logistics domain.

title: Product manager (Special Operations)
description:
The Fourth Law (Четвертий Закон) — провідний український виробник технологій автономності для дронів. Рішення компанії кодифіковані за стандартами НАТО та застосовуються у понад 50 підрозділах СОУ і 20+ виробників дронів. Наші вироби носять імена українських діячів розстріляного відродження та шістдесятників — Василя Стуса, Олени Теліги, Миколи Зерова та Анатолія Лупиноса.
У 2026 році компанія отримала відзнаку від DOU як найперспективніший проект у сфері оборонних технологій.

Місія: будуємо системи, призначені для протидії повітряним загрозам. Наші продукти створюються на перетині hardware, software, ШІ та польових операцій.

Ми розвиваємо напрям Special Operations — спеціальні місії, робота з військовими підрозділами та складні сценарії використання автономних систем. Тож шукаємо Product Manager, який очолить цей трек: поглибить наявні напрацювання, визначить стратегію розвитку та масштабує команду.

Основні задачі:

-  Управління продуктами: очолення продуктового треку Special Operations, де розробляються модулі автономності для спеціальних місій з використанням БПЛА.
-  Побудова стратегії: визначення стратегії продуктового напрямку, планування довгострокових планів і цілей виходячи з потреб і умов ринку.
-  Робота «в полях»: Спілкування з користувачами та партнерами, щоб розуміти реальні сценарії використання системи в бойових умовах.
-  Технічне лідерство: Написання специфікацій, що об’єднують вимоги до hardware та software. Координація роботи інженерів з автономності, ML та QA.
-  Масштабування: Найм та розвиток команди для цього напряму.

Досвід та навички, які ми шукаємо:

-  Досвід: 5+ років у Product Management зі складними технічними системами.
-  Системне мислення: Здатність бачити продукт як частину великої екосистеми (дрони — софт — мережа — оператор).
-  Комунікації: Вміння чітко формулювати думки українською та англійською (B2+).
-  Self-starter mindset: Готовність працювати в умовах невизначеності та самостійно приймати рішення на старті треку.
Буде плюсом: Досвід роботи з БПЛА, розуміння тактик застосування БПЛА, досвід в управлінні декількома продуктами.

Чому варто обрати нас:

- Робота, яка матиме реальний вплив. Ми створюємо продукти, які безпосередньо посилюють оборонний потенціал України.
- Робота з топовими інженерами у сфері MilTech та автономності.
- Офіційне оформлення трудових відносин в Дія.Сіті.
- Можливість бронювання військовозобов’язаних працівників згідно з вимогами чинного законодавства.
- Щорічна оплачувана відпустка — 24 календарні дні.
- Для ветеранів передбачена додаткова оплачувана відпустка — 14 календарних днів.
- Оплачувані лікарняні відповідно до законодавства.
- Можливість компенсації витрат на навчання згідно з внутрішніми політиками компанії.
Ми шукаємо не виконавців, а однодумців, які поділяють наші цінності та готові будувати майбутнє українського MilTech.

title: AI Engineer (Backend-Focused, Node.js)
description:
We’re looking for an AI Engineer to join our outsourcing team — not a pure ML researcher, but a pragmatic, data-driven backend engineer who knows how to put LLMs, vision APIs, and off-the-shelf models to work inside real products.

Most of our work isn’t training models from scratch — it’s understanding the business logic, collecting and cleaning data, wiring it into LLMs or services like AWS Textract, and shipping the result as a reliable API inside our existing platform.

If you’ve spent the last few years building APIs and integrations, you’re comfortable with data, and you’ve leaned hard into Cursor or Claude Code to deliver projects faster — this is for you.

What you’ll do

- Build and ship LLM-powered features: prompt design, data prep, passing context to the model, parsing and validating output, returning clean APIs.
- Design and implement integrations between our product and third-party AI services (OpenAI, Anthropic, Hugging Face models, AWS Textract, etc.).
- Take document-processing and computer-vision tasks end-to-end: ingest → Textract/vision API → post-process → structured output consumed by our backend.
- Write backend services and APIs in Node.js (our primary backend), dropping into Python when a task calls for it (model work, data scripts, fine-tuning).
- Fine-tune existing models and prompts — not from scratch, but iterating on what’s already in place to get better accuracy, cost, or latency.
- Do the unglamorous but critical work: data collection, cleaning, transformation, pattern-finding — often by letting an LLM do the heavy lifting on structured and unstructured input.
- Maintain and improve existing AI and automation workflows already running in production.
- Monitor cost and performance of model/API usage, propose optimizations, and forecast costs for new features.
- Prepare and present demos and solution overviews to U.S.-based clients.
- Document architecture, prompts, and pipelines in Confluence.

What we’re looking for

-  2+ years shipping production backend systems, with meaningful hands-on experience integrating LLMs or AI APIs into real products.
-  Strong in Node.js with the flexibility to work in Python. We need someone ready to switch to Puthon if needed.
- Solid grasp of algorithms and data structures — enough to write custom logic when an LLM or library can’t cover the case.
- Real experience with LLM integrations: OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar. Prompt engineering, function/tool calling, structured output, retrieval, evaluation.
- Familiarity with the Hugging Face ecosystem — picking models, running inference, fine-tuning where it makes sense.
-  API and integrations background: REST, auth, webhooks, rate limits, retries, idempotency — the stuff that makes integrations not break at 2 a.m.
- Comfortable with data work: collecting, cleaning, transforming, and analyzing data (SQL, pandas, or the Node equivalents).
- Working knowledge of AWS — especially Textract, Lambda, S3, and the services around document and data pipelines. Bonus for Athena, Glue, Kinesis, SageMaker.
- Exposure to NLP and Computer Vision concepts — enough to pick the right tool and evaluate results, not necessarily to train SOTA models.
- Familiarity with CI/CD and deploying AI-powered services to production.
- Experience building chatbot workflows — conversational flows, multi-turn logic, context management — is a plus, as this is among our planned projects.
-  AI-native delivery workflow. You use Cursor or Claude Code daily and know how to ship a project with minimal hand-written code — scoping work for the agent, reviewing generated code critically, orchestrating multi-step tasks, and getting to shipped quality faster than a traditional workflow. If you can’t describe how you use these tools to deliver, this role isn’t the right fit.

Nice to have

- Experience fine-tuning open-source LLMs or vision models on domain-specific data.
- Background in fintech, healthcare, or construction domains.
- Experience with vector databases, RAG pipelines, or agentic workflows.

What we offer

-  Competitive salary with regular reviews.
- Support for individual entrepreneurs with accounting assistance.
- Fully remote work.
- A clear path for professional development and growth.
- A friendly team environment and engaging team-building activities (online and offline).
